vibe: Underground, edgy, high-contrast brutalist SaaS, functional and raw

spacing_and_layout.general: Dense, utilitarian, minimal padding in components, generous padding between sections.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Control Room Grid (Dense). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for marketplace listings. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data and text. Center alignment only for hero headlines.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid borders everywhere (border-border). No border-radius (rounded-none). Sharp edges.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border (#2A2A2A), no shadow. Hover: border color shifts to #FF3333 or #F9F9F9.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Primary buttons: Flat Red (#FF3333) background, no border-radius, pure white text. Hover: darker red or inverted. Secondary: Transparent with 1px white border.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Flat black background (#050505), 1px border (#2A2A2A). Focus: border-red-500, no soft ring.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid black background with a hard 1px bottom border. Not glassmorphic. We want raw and technical.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Instant or very fast transitions (duration-150). Color shifts from muted to bright.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a kinetic marquee for marketplace stats or a rebellious slogan (e.g., 'BAD ADS • GOOD TRAFFIC • UNFILTERED REACH').

components.navigation: Top bar, strict flex layout, text links with sharp hover states.
components.marketplace_listing_card: Dense bento box. Image on top (aspect-video, edge-to-edge), metadata stacked below with monospace font, clear price tag in accent color.
components.dashboard: Tables for listings and campaigns. 1px borders between rows. Monospace data.

hero_backgrounds.description: Architectural photography of building tunnel with neon. Use with heavy black/red overlay.
Black and white concrete building. Dark brutalist architecture.

listing_banners.description: Example banner ad image for marketplace listing.
Example banner ad image for marketplace listing.
Example banner ad image for marketplace listing.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add font families to tailwind.config.js: fontFamily: { unbounded: [\'Unbounded\', \'sans-serif\'], mono: [\'JetBrains Mono\', \'monospace\'] }.
Do NOT use rounded corners anywhere. Strip rounded corners from Shadcn UI. Use 'rounded-none'.
For the marketplace grid, use a dense grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6).
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for complex marketing layouts. Customize Shadcn components to remove border radius, soft shadows, and Apple-like glassmorphism.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.
